info.description: A chronological history section with a year beam and entries.

heading.description: Section heading, e.g. 'A History of Firsts'.

entries.description: The milestones shown on the timeline, in order.

years.description: Years shown along the beam, e.g. 2010, 2016, 2022, 2025, 2026. One per row.

beamCaption.description: Italic caption near the final year, e.g. '…debuts on Nasdaq under ticker: PWRL'.

backgroundGraphic.description: Optional full-width illustration behind the lower cards.
